positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, central composition featuring a stylized celestial forest scene. The design depicts glowing bioluminescent flora, delicate root systems, and a stylized crescent moon visible through interwoven branches. Use a neo-art nouveau aesthetic combined with ethereal fantasy elements. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo blues, vibrant teal, electric turquoise, and shimmering gold accents. Achieve strong silhouettes and high contrast suitable for apparel printing. The lighting should be dramatic and magical, emanating softly from the plants (glow effect). Clean lines, intricate detail, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, seamless print design.
